description: Confirmation of a high-consequence action. Never closes on click-outside. `requireText` locks the confirm button until a word is typed.

open.description: Whether the dialog is shown. Closed when absent.

title.description: The dialog heading. Absent leaves the eyebrow as the name.

eyebrow.description: Small uppercase label above the title.

content.description: The dialog body — the question and any detail.

destructive.description: Gives the confirm button Arena's only filled danger surface.

requireText.description: Locks the confirm button until this exact word is typed.

cancel.description: The Cancel action was taken. The accessible (Angular) dialog also reports the Escape key; React's ConfirmDialog handles no keydown -- see its behaviour binding.
